message: Beginning Phase 4 commit analysis. Found: 3 new systems, 2 tests, 1 test helper, docs updates.

Phase 4 commits complete. 5 commits created: TestSubscriber helper, MoveExecutionSystem, HintSystem+NoMovesDetectionSystem, UndoSystem+AutoCompleteSystem tests, docs. Remaining unstaged are agent runtime state files (.claude/heartbeat, .claude/mailbox) — intentionally not committed.
Beginning Phase 5 commit sequence: GameFlowSystem, reviewer fixes, 3 test files, docs
Phase 5 commit sequence done: 6 commits (88f88bd..b4c561f). Working tree clean of all game code.

Analyzing Phase 6 changes — planning 3 commit groups: (1) fix(systems): MoveEnumerator + test fixes, (2) test(systems): new GameFlowSystem + MoveEnumerator tests, (3) docs: EVENTS + ACTIVITY_LOG update

Phase 6 committed: 3 atomic commits — fix(systems) MoveEnumerator + test fixes, test(systems) GameFlowSystem + MoveEnumerator tests, docs events + activity log. Working tree clean of all game code changes.
